snippet.title: Focker-In-Law | Official Trailer
snippet.description:
The circle of trust just got bigger. Focker-In-Law is in theaters this Thanksgiving. 
 ______  

This November, comedy icon and Emmy winner Ben Stiller and two-time Oscar® winner Robert De Niro reunite, joined by Grammy winner and Oscar® nominee Ariana Grande, in Focker-In-Law, a new chapter in the blockbuster Meet the Parents franchise.
 
Written and directed by John Hamburg, who co-wrote the three previous Meet the Parents films, Focker-In-Law is produced by Oscar® nominee Jane Rosenthal and Robert De Niro for Tribeca Productions; Ben Stiller and Oscar® winner John Lesher for Red Hour Films; Emmy winner Jay Roach for Delirious Media; and John Hamburg for Particular Pictures.


Find Focker-In-Law on Instagram at https://www.instagram.com/fockerinlaw/
Follow Focker-In-Law on Facebook at  https://www.facebook.com/fockerinlaw/
Follow Focker-In-Law on X at https://twitter.com/fockerinlaw
Follow Focker-In-Law on TikTok at https://www.tiktok.com/@fockerinlaw
https://www.fockerinlaw.com 

Genre: Comedy
Cast: Robert De Niro, Ben Stiller, Ariana Grande, Owen Wilson, Blythe Danner, Teri Polo, Skyler Gisondo, Beanie Feldstein, Eduardo Franco
Written and directed by: John Hamburg
Producers:Jane Rosenthal, Robert De Niro, Ben Stiller, John Lesher, Jay Roach, John Hamburg

snippet.title: GODZILLA MINUS ZERO | First Look Teaser
snippet.description:
GODZILLA MINUS ZERO
VFX, Written, and Directed by Takashi Yamazaki
In theatres November 6
Follow @godzilla_toho and @GKIDSfilms for more updates!
godzillaminuszero.com

GODZILLA MINUS ZERO picks up in 1949, two years after the tumultuous events of Godzilla Minus One, and continues the story of the Shikishima family as they face an all-new calamity. Additionally confirmed out of CinemaCon, Ryunosuke Kamiki, the hero who faced Godzilla’s terror in Godzilla Minus One, returns as Koichi Shikishima, and is joined by Minami Hamabe as Noriko Oishi, who miraculously survived Godzilla’s first attack on Tokyo.

As a project Filmed For IMAX, GODZILLA MINUS ZERO was shot with high-definition digital cameras certified by IMAX, and optimized in sound and imagery unique to IMAX screens. Fans can look forward to seeing Godzilla presented to all new terrifying heights, making GODZILLA MINUS ZERO in a true cinematic event not to be missed.

Godzilla Store: https://godzilla.com/collections/all

For more information regarding Godzilla, check out our other channels:

Godzilla News: 
https://godzilla.com/blogs/news 

Instagram:
https://www.instagram.com/godzilla_toho/ 

X:
https://twitter.com/Godzilla_Toho

Facebook: 
https://www.facebook.com/tohogodzillaofficial/ 

TikTok:
https://www.tiktok.com/@tohogodzillaofficial

=====

©Toho Co., Ltd. All Rights Reserved.

snippet.title: Black Cat: The Master Thief| Character Reveal Trailer | Marvel Rivals
snippet.description:
Cross her path and your luck runs out! 🍀

One of the world's premier thieves, Felicia Hardy glides across the battlefield with swift precision and a dancer's grace, ever ready to purloin an opponent's fortune. Those who meet the Black Cat's gaze should beware, as her omens never miss their mark!

Felicia Hardy is one of the most notorious thieves in the world. Once the Black Cat has her eyes on a prize, it's already as good as gone. This is one feline femme fatale you don't want to cross... because luck is always on her side!

The Black Cat was recruited by Wilson Fisk to infiltrate Doctor Strange's Sanctum Sanctorum and steal the Tablet of Life and Time. However, while Kingpin sought to harness its ancient power to counter Alchemax by making a deal with the Gilded Saint, she hatched a plan of her own to free his captives. Let the double cross commence!

Season 7.5 arrives on April 17, 2026

Keep your eyes on the prize, because this cat always lands on her feet.

Play free now on:
🔹 Steam: https://t.co/IPhy0Of1cG
🔹 PlayStation: https://t.co/FR0aVfTmcn
🔹 Xbox: https://t.co/GaAYz7Nku6
🔹 Epic Games: https://t.co/QXoxz0VAP7

Follow #MarvelRivals for the latest news:
🔹 Discord: https://discord.gg/marvelrivals
🔹 X: https://x.com/MarvelRivals
🔹 Instagram: https://www.instagram.com/marvelrivals/

localized.description:

Coqueta, si me quieres solo di la neta.

Video Oficial: https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=nNUiVCKu_9Y

Sigue a Fuerza Regida:
https://www.youtube.com/channel/UCFLI6KAjrKRtydD7KqiYvAw

Suscríbete para más letras de tus canciones favoritas 🔥
Activa la campanita 🔔 y no te pierdas ningún estreno.

Letra de la canción:
Otra de más, de las cumbias originales
Sus compas de Fuerza Regida y Grupo Frontera
Vuélvale a marcar, compa Carlos

Pensando y viendo las estrellas, pregunté
Si en algún lugar esto se estaría repitiendo
Si es que en otro mundo tal vez nos ganó el deseo
O si solo fuimos un error del universo

Baby, bésame
Quiero que vuelvas a mis brazos pa' sentirnos eternos como la última vez
Quiero confesarte, te extraño, como un loco tе pienso, yo sé que tú también
Porfa, ma, ya vuelvе conmigo, pero no como amigos como la última vez
Quiero confesarte, te extraño, como un loco te pienso, yo sé que tú también

Coqueta
Si me quieres, solo di la neta
Que se entere todito el planeta
Chula, ya decide qué onda, nena
Qué onda, nena
Coqueta
Si me quieres, solo di la neta
Que se entere todito el planeta
Chula, ya decide qué onda, nena
Qué onda, nena

Dame, dame un besito, mami
Dale, ¿cómo no quieres que me clave?
De mi cel ahí te va la clave, que yo no hablo con nadie
Nomás contigo

Dale, ¿cómo no quieres que me clave?
De mi cel ahí te va la clave, que yo no hablo con nadie
Nomás contigo

Esto es otro pedo
Grupo Frontera y Fuerza Regida, pa
¡Wuh!

Es que me mata el recuerdo y solo pienso que pienso
Que te quites los Dolce & Gabbana
Yo solo siento que siento, que no sé qué es lo que siento
Tanto nos pasó en una semana
Ya bloquéame si no es cierto, pero yo sé, baby
Cierto que ambos, mami, nos teníamos ganas
Puede que sí, reconozco, sé que apenas te conozco
Lo que me mató fue tu mirada

Quiero que vuelvas a mis brazos pa' sentirnos eternos como la última vez

snippet.title: Young Miko - BIAF (Official)
snippet.description:
Listen to “BIAF 3” from the new upcoming deluxe, “Do Not Disturb”: 

Stay Up to Date: https://youngmiko.lnk.to/email
 
Follow Young Miko: 
TikTok – https://www.tiktok.com/@itsyoungmiko
Instagram – https://www.instagram.com/itsyoungmiko/
Facebook –  https://www.facebook.com/itsyoungmiko
Twitter –https://x.com/itsyoungmiko
Website: https://www.youngmiko.com/

 Lyrics: 

hay cosas en la vida que de mi pueden pensar 
se pueden imaginar
que mucho les gusta hablar 
son cosas de la vida que nunca van a cambiar 
pero si algo te aseguro 
es que a mi me encanta chingar 

baby imma freak 
tómame fotos así 
tómame fotos así 
poso poso para ti 

mirror mirror on the wall
la más freaky aquí soy yo 
delicious en toa las poses 
quien me pruebe se jukió
toa la semana en el gym
y en el weekend lo enseño to 
pa escuchar lo que otros dicen
mejor te lo digo yo 
como si na’
que si te tiro a estas horas es pa singa’ 
que si me prendes en flash yo te voa posá’  
no significa que facil me vas a llevar 
una reina no es facil de coronar 

baby imma freak 
tómame fotos así 
tómame fotos así 
poso poso para ti 

nasty, cuando te quiero ver me pongo sucia y se me va lo de romantic
baby, ya tu sabes pa que fue que vine si combiné brasier y panty 
(2x) 
muy sexy y yo lo sé 
tu crush y yo lo sé 
muy sexy pa tener una jeva y no dos o tres 

baby imma freak 
tómame fotos así 
tómame fotos así 
poso poso para ti

baby imma freak 
no te vas a querer ir 
después me vas a decir 
que no te lo han hecho así 

baby imma freak 
tómame fotos así 
tómame fotos así 
poso poso para ti


Credits:
Creative direction: Young Miko
Directed by: Kemel Jamis & Joshua Rivera
Production House: 1K Dojo
Executive Production: Mariana Beatriz & Ian Arduengo

Capitol Music Group
Capitol Marketing: Zach Elgort
Capitol A&R: Sergio Vega
Capitol Digital: Ashley Landa
 
#YoungMiko #DoNotDisturb #BIAF

snippet.title: Massachusetts Roots or Rental
snippet.description: Due to a military relocation, a family needs to move to Massachusetts fast. Knowing that this location is temporary, he wants to rent, but after a recent health scare, she's eager to buy a home and set down roots.

snippet.title: Searching for a Civilization that Doesn't Exist
snippet.description:
As King of the Unstable SMP, I recently sent 1000 players on an expedition outside of my kingdom. When I returned, all of them were missing. This is searching for a civilization that doesn't exist. 

Unstable SMP:
➜ ‪  ‪  @FlameFragsMC 
➜     @wemmbumc 
➜     @Spokeishere 
➜     @ParrotX2  

Like ParrotX2 and his Unstable SMP series, where he is escaping Paragon / Proton: Minecraft's Most Secure Prison, or got hunted by a Minecraft Player who doesn't exist. This is a new and original Minecraft idea like HermitCraft or Lifesteal with Wemmbu, FlameFrags, or Spoke. Survival is harder than Hardcore Minecraft because PVP is on.

People in this video: @TheobaldTheBird 

This is a video on the Unstable Universe: a staged Minecraft server where ParrotX2, Wemmbu, Spoke, and FlameFrags tell stories in Minecraft.

A Minecraft video made by Parrot or ParrotX2 on other platforms! Enjoy!

snippet.title: A Little Park Music
snippet.description: When a piano appears in the park gazebo, interfering with important work, city manager Allie joins forces with rookie cop Ryan to remove it, only to find both music and love are hard to resist. Stars Laci J Mailey, Beau Mirchoff.
